====Pokémon====
This listing is of Phoebe's Pokémon in the Pokémon Adventures manga.
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Phoebe
|pkmn=Dusclops
|type1=Ghost
|img=Phoebe Dusclops Adventures.png
|img_size=120px
|epnum=PS251
|epname=The Beginning of the End with Kyogre & Groudon XIII
|desc={{p|Dusclops}} is Phoebe's only known Pokémon. It was first seen with its Trainer when they appeared before Wallace with Steven and the other Elite Four members. Later, it was used to save the {{tc|Swimmer}} and blind boy from the crumbling buildings of [[Slateport City]].

Dusclops's only known move is {{m|Shadow Punch}}.}}

=====Temporary=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Phoebe
|pkmn=Regice
|type1=Ice
|img=Brandon Regice Adventures.png
|epnum=PS254
|epname=A Royal Rumble with Regirock, Regice and Registeel II
|main=Brandon's legendary giants
|main_section=Pokémon Adventures
|desc={{p|Regice}} was awakened by Steven and the Elite Four to be used to contain Groudon and Kyogre's power. Phoebe controlled Regice with Glacia while the others controlled Regirock and Registeel. After Steven died from the strain of controlling the three Pokémon, Regice lashed out and ran away. It was later found by [[Brandon]] and captured.}}
